name: popo-sheet-tool-copy
description: Experimental POPO Sheet MCP tools backed by Kimi WebBridge and ShareDB snapshot/op flows.

interface.shortDescription: Experimental verified POPO Sheet read/write tools
interface.longDescription: A local isolated MCP tool copy for reading, matching, writing, and verifying NetEase POPO online spreadsheets via Kimi WebBridge and ShareDB.
defaultPrompt: Read a POPO sheet by snapshot
Write POPO cells by matched names
